original_image_tags: The back of a standard US government document envelope or folder. Two punch holes are visible at the top. The paper shows bleed-through of typed text from the front side. Several official received stamps are applied.

elements.description: Page displaying faint reversed typed text and multiple ink stamps. Visible stamps include 'RECEIVED - LADD FBI U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE APR 10 12 35 PM '50', 'CORRELATION - LIAISON F.B.I. U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE APR 10 2 06 PM '50', 'REC'D BELMONT F.B.I. DEPT. OF JUSTICE APR 10 2 25 PM '50', and 'RECEIVED U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE FBI APR 25 10 43 AM '50'. Two black circular hole punches are visible at the top edge.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim stamp text not mentioned at all in Description A, indicating hallucination of detailed content.
